findings.finding: Original RMD-05 assurance provenance closure was incomplete.
findings.resolution_ref: Attempt-16 protocol and public closure validation preserve and require the complete provenance chain.

findings.finding: Capacity and local-gate evidence required deterministic preservation.
findings.resolution_ref: Candidate-bound local evidence and deterministic builders are covered by the validated receipt and public suite.

findings.finding: Post-review closure required an exact authority boundary.
findings.resolution_ref: Exact authority and non-authority sets are fail-closed and regression-tested.

findings.resolution_ref: Any non-allowlisted post-review path is rejected.

findings.resolution_ref: Observed authority delta must equal deterministic materialization exactly.

findings.finding: Acceptance and delivery authorities required candidate-bound deterministic reconstruction.
findings.resolution_ref: Acceptance, delivery status, provenance, manifest, facts, and Stage 6 authorities are rebuilt and byte-compared.

findings.finding: Final closure required exact two-model, shared-request, shared-receipt protocol enforcement.
findings.resolution_ref: The final protocol requires two distinct attempt-16 tasks, shared request/receipt, and two PASS replies.

findings.resolution_ref: Validator preserves all 15 phases and their pinned artifacts before allowing attempt 16.

findings.finding: Receipt-anchor and candidate/tree identity required exact validation.

findings.finding: Authority materialization required deterministic verification rather than trust in updated manifests.

findings.finding: Public closure required protection against unexpected path additions and bypasses.
findings.resolution_ref: Only exact paths are accepted; extra descendants and protected drift are blocked.

findings.resolution_ref: All seven UTF-8 Governance documents are included in the 67 exact authorities, pinned to reviewed render bytes, and synchronized render drift is rejected.

limitations: This review proves only local immutable Git objects, deterministic post-candidate authority paths, and local synthetic gates.
It does not prove protected Oracles, real Gmail, private repository state, real Secrets, production health/workflows, deployment, publication, RMD-06, RMD-07, or final AC-033.
The repository’s current 15-attempt state remains intentionally BLOCKED until both attempt-16 replies and the actual final materialization are recorded and separately rendered/checked.
summary: PASS: all four review dimensions pass; the complete applicable history through RMD05-CLOSURE-010 is resolved in the candidate’s fail-closed mechanism. The final 15/16 protocol remains correctly pending materialization rather than being prematurely claimed closed.
